**<h2 align="center"> Know About Me </h2>**
<img src="https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/861f23a4-3da2-48b6-943b-b638dadb13a0" align="left" width="200" />

What started as a hobby turned into a passion, and now I’m working towards building a career in programming. Over time, I realized how much I enjoy solving problems, learning new technologies, and turning ideas into real projects. Outside of coding, I enjoy anime and manga, I’m passionate about music, and I like exploring different areas of technology, especially when it comes to developing websites and systems, where I can combine creativity with logic to build useful and engaging experiences. I’m constantly improving my skills, learning new tools, and challenging myself with projects that help me grow as a developer, always aiming to gain real-world experience and work on meaningful projects that make an impact.
